parameters.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS recent_digests, MAX(created_at) AS last_digest_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - MAX(created_at))::int AS seconds_since_last
FROM pharmaos_audit_log WHERE event_type = 'DIGEST_GENERATED'
  AND created_at >= '{{ $json.cooldownCutoff }}'::timestamptz;

parameters.jsCode: return [{json: {skipped: true, reason: 'Cooldown active', timestamp: new Date().toISOString()}}];

parameters.query: SELECT s.id, s.source_id, s.signal_domain, s.signal_type, s.source, s.title, s.drug_name, s.entity_name, s.indication, s.sponsor, s.phase, s.status, s.moa, s.modality, s.geography, s.nct_id, s.url, s.impact_level, s.impact_score, s.priority_score, s.route_tier, s.notif_priority, s.ai_processed, s.ai_summary, s.ai_classification, s.recommended_action, s.competitor_flag, s.is_urgent, s.confidence, s.version, s.scoring_version, s.override_status, s.override_by, s.override_reason, s.score_breakdown, s.quality_score, s.fingerprint, s.asset_id, s.first_seen_at, s.last_seen_at, s.ingested_at, CASE WHEN s.version = 1 THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UPDATE' END AS signal_status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - s.first_seen_at)/3600.0 AS age_hours, a.name AS asset_name, a.strategic_priority, a.therapeutic_area, a.competitive_set, a.peak_sales_forecast, a.patent_expiry, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - s.first_seen_at) > 3600 THEN ROUND((s.version - 1)::numeric / (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - s.first_seen_at)/3600.0), 4) ELSE 0 END AS signal_velocity, CASE WHEN a.patent_expiry IS NOT NULL THEN (a.patent_expiry - CURRENT_DATE) ELSE NULL END AS days_to_patent_expiry FROM signals_mesh s LEFT JOIN pharmaos_assets a ON s.asset_id = a.id WHERE s.last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND s.ai_processed = TRUE AND COALESCE(s.status, '') NOT IN ('TTL_EXPIRED','withdrawn','terminated') ORDER BY CASE s.impact_level WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MED' THEN 2 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, s.priority_score DESC NULLS LAST, s.impact_score DESC, s.last_seen_at DESC;

SELECT DATE(last_seen_at) AS signal_date, signal_domain, impact_level, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG(impact_score)::numeric(5,2) AS avg_score, MAX(impact_score) AS max_score, SUM(CASE WHEN competitor_flag THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS competitor_count, SUM(CASE WHEN version = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_signals, SUM(CASE WHEN is_urgent THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS urgent_count, COUNT(DISTINCT drug_name) FILTER (WHERE drug_name != '') AS unique_drugs FROM signals_mesh WHERE last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND ai_processed = TRUE GROUP BY DATE(last_seen_at), signal_domain, impact_level ORDER BY signal_date DESC, signal_domain;

SELECT COALESCE(drug_name, entity_name) AS drug_name, sponsor, COALESCE(indication, 'Unknown') AS indication, signal_domain, COUNT(*) AS signal_count, MAX(impact_score) AS peak_score, AVG(impact_score)::numeric(5,2) AS avg_score, MIN(first_seen_at)::date AS first_seen, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT signal_type, ', ') AS signal_types, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT source, ', ') AS sources, SUM(CASE WHEN is_urgent THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS urgent_count, MAX(priority_score) AS max_priority FROM signals_mesh WHERE competitor_flag = TRUE AND last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND ai_processed = TRUE GROUP BY COALESCE(drug_name, entity_name), sponsor, indication, signal_domain ORDER BY peak_score DESC, signal_count DESC LIMIT 15;

SELECT COALESCE(indication, 'Unknown') AS indication, signal_domain, COUNT(*) AS total_signals, SUM(CASE WHEN impact_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_count, SUM(CASE WHEN impact_level = 'MED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS med_count, SUM(CASE WHEN competitor_flag THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS competitor_signals, AVG(impact_score)::numeric(5,2) AS avg_score, MAX(impact_score) AS max_score, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(drug_name, entity_name)) AS unique_drugs, COUNT(DISTINCT sponsor) AS unique_sponsors FROM signals_mesh WHERE last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND ai_processed = TRUE GROUP BY indication, signal_domain ORDER BY high_count DESC, total_signals DESC LIMIT 15;

SELECT ce.id, ce.title, ce.domains, ce.signal_ids, ce.compound_risk_score, ce.trigger_pattern, ce.pattern_metadata, ce.ai_narrative, ce.recommended_actions, ce.escalation_level, ce.resolved, ce.false_positive, ce.detected_at, (SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT s.drug_name, ', ') FROM signals_mesh s WHERE s.id = ANY(ce.signal_ids) AND s.drug_name != '') AS linked_drugs, (SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT s.indication, ', ') FROM signals_mesh s WHERE s.id = ANY(ce.signal_ids) AND s.indication != '') AS linked_indications, (SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT s.sponsor, ', ') FROM signals_mesh s WHERE s.id = ANY(ce.signal_ids) AND s.sponsor != '') AS linked_sponsors, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signals_mesh s WHERE s.id = ANY(ce.signal_ids)) AS linked_signal_count FROM compound_events ce WHERE ce.resolved = FALSE AND ce.false_positive = FALSE AND ce.detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours' ORDER BY ce.compound_risk_score DESC, ce.detected_at DESC;

SELECT mv.asset_id, mv.asset_name, mv.phase, mv.strategic_priority, mv.total_signals, mv.high_signals, mv.peak_score, a.therapeutic_area, a.competitive_set, a.patent_expiry, a.peak_sales_forecast, a.last_signal_at, a.modality, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signals_mesh s WHERE s.asset_id = mv.asset_id AND s.last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS signals_24h, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signals_mesh s WHERE s.asset_id = mv.asset_id AND s.last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND s.impact_level = 'HIGH') AS high_24h, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM signals_mesh s WHERE s.asset_id = mv.asset_id AND s.last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND s.competitor_flag = TRUE) AS competitor_24h FROM mv_asset_signal_summary mv JOIN pharmaos_assets a ON mv.asset_id = a.id WHERE mv.total_signals > 0 ORDER BY mv.high_signals DESC, mv.peak_score DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT id, decision_type, asset_id, question, decision_made, decision_rationale, outcome, outcome_score, tags, made_by, made_at FROM strategy_memory WHERE made_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY made_at DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT som.id, som.signal_id, som.signal_domain, som.override_action, som.override_by, som.override_reason, som.previous_level, som.new_impact_level, som.created_at, s.drug_name, s.indication, s.sponsor, s.impact_score FROM signal_overrides_mesh som JOIN signals_mesh s ON som.signal_id = s.id WHERE som.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY som.created_at DESC;

SELECT 'ingestion' AS metric_type, domain, source, SUM(signals_fetched) AS total_fetched, SUM(signals_new) AS total_new, SUM(signals_updated) AS total_updated, SUM(signals_deduped) AS total_deduped, SUM(errors) AS total_errors, COUNT(*) AS run_count, MAX(finished_at) AS last_run, ROUND(100.0*(1 - SUM(errors)::numeric/NULLIF(SUM(signals_fetched),0)),1) AS success_rate FROM pharmaos_ingestion_runs WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY domain, source UNION ALL SELECT 'health', '', metric_name, metric_value::int, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, recorded_at, 0 FROM pharmaos_system_health WHERE recorded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY last_run DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT service_name, state, failure_count, success_count, last_failure_at, last_success_at, opened_at, threshold, cooldown_seconds, updated_at FROM pharmaos_circuit_breaker ORDER BY CASE state WHEN 'OPEN' THEN 1 WHEN 'HALF_OPEN' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, service_name;

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count, MIN(created_at) AS oldest, MAX(created_at) AS newest, AVG(retry_count)::numeric(3,1) AS avg_retries, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT source_workflow, ', ') AS workflows FROM pharmaos_dead_letter_queue WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY status ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 1 WHEN 'RETRYING' THEN 2 WHEN 'ABANDONED' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END;

SELECT transformation_type, pipeline_stage, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT signal_id) AS unique_signals, MAX(created_at) AS latest_event FROM signal_lineage WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY transformation_type, pipeline_stage ORDER BY event_count DESC;

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ttl_expires_at IS NOT NULL AND ttl_expires_at <= NOW() + INTERVAL '24 hours' AND ttl_expires_at > NOW()) AS expiring_24h, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ttl_expires_at IS NOT NULL AND ttl_expires_at <= NOW() AND status != 'TTL_EXPIRED') AS overdue_expiry, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'TTL_EXPIRED' AND last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS recently_expired, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ai_processed = FALSE AND ingested_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS unprocessed_24h FROM signals_mesh;

-- Persist digest run metrics + audit log
DO $$
DECLARE
  _digest_id UUID;
BEGIN
  -- Audit log entry
  INSERT INTO pharmaos_audit_log (event_type, event_data, created_at)
  VALUES ('DIGEST_GENERATED', '{{ JSON.stringify({
    pti: $json.ptiScore, risk: $json.riskLevel,
    total: $json.total24h, high: $json.highCount,
    compound_events: $json.compoundEventCount,
    channels: $json.channelCount,
    ai_model: $json.aiModel, ai_success: $json.aiSuccess,
    ai_tokens: $json.aiTokens?.total || 0,
    pipeline_version: $json.pipelineVersion
  }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, NOW())
  RETURNING id INTO _digest_id;

  -- System health metrics
  INSERT INTO pharmaos_system_health (metric_name, metric_value, recorded_at)
  VALUES
    ('digest_pti_score', '{{ $json.ptiScore }}', NOW()),
    ('digest_total_signals', '{{ $json.total24h }}', NOW()),
    ('digest_high_count', '{{ $json.highCount }}', NOW()),
    ('digest_compound_events', '{{ $json.compoundEventCount }}', NOW()),
    ('digest_channels_sent', '{{ $json.channelCount }}', NOW()),
    ('digest_ai_tokens', '{{ $json.aiTokens?.total || 0 }}', NOW()),
    ('digest_ingestion_success_rate', '{{ $json.ingestionSuccessRate }}', NOW()),
    ('digest_open_breakers', '{{ $json.openBreakers }}', NOW()),
    ('digest_dlq_pending', '{{ $json.dlqPending }}', NOW()),
    ('digest_block_count', '{{ $json.blockCount }}', NOW());
END $$;
